Next Category
Phase 2 - 6 Steps for Writing Copy for
Ads
FB Ad Copywriting
Phase 2 of our three part copywriting training. If you haven't gone through Phase 1,
please do so now.
In this section we explore the six part process to pulling copy together. Prior to
commencing the breakdown, it's important to get a proper brief back from your
client, we discuss the questions to make sure you ask during your kick off call together
and how to nail down their brand voice.
Using a worksheet (you can print a template provided here, although I normally map
it out on a word doc as you may have fewer/more personas), the process is as
follows:
Step 1: Map out personas
Step 2: Identify product, features & proof points
Step 3: Map out indirect competition
Step 4: Map out what product achieves/results
Step 5: Map out core problem
Step 6: Map out hooks
Make sure you prioritise this process, it can take anywhere from 2-4 hours per client
to get it done properly but once completed means you have a whole treasure box to
pull copy from - especially if your team member leaves and you need to get someone
else in quick!
